decision.summary: No existing position needs management and there is no valid new price-hit or floor entry.
decision.rationale: Beecthor’s latest transcript and recent summaries still keep the core thesis bearish while BTC stays below the 75k-76k invalidation area, but Binance execution reality is a strong rebound with BTC at 74483.41, up 4.88% on the day and near the 24h high. That weakens bearish momentum confirmation for the nearest daily downside market (74k dip on April 14 at 69.5%), while the nearest upside price-hit markets such as 75k on April 14 or 76k April 13-19 conflict with Beecthor’s still-bearish thesis. The floor markets above 74k are also invalid because the current thesis still allows and even favors a move back below 74k unless price clearly reclaims 75k-76k.
